title: Services Privacy Policy
metaDescription: Privacy policy for Anytime services (GitHub integration, reports, dashboards, etc.)
backToEditorPrivacy: For the Markdown editor alone, see the <link>Privacy Policy</link>.
crossLinkToServices: For service features such as GitHub integration and reports, see the <link>Services Privacy Policy</link>.
section1Body: This policy explains how information is handled in features beyond the standalone Markdown editor, including GitHub integration, reports and articles (press/report), code-analysis dashboards, and analytics. These features may be enabled at the operator's discretion; if you do not use them, the related processing does not occur. For the standalone Markdown editor, please see the separate Privacy Policy.
section2Body: If you enable GitHub integration and sign in, your GitHub account identifiers and access token are used for authentication. When you save a document, its content is committed to the GitHub repository you specify, routed through our server. These actions occur only in response to your actions, and the token is used solely for the save operation.
section3Body: Some features, such as reports/articles and code analysis, may use backend services (e.g., Supabase) to store and retrieve data. Only when you use these features is the relevant data stored in or read from the backend.
section4Intro: Some features may connect to external services for display or retrieval, such as:
section4ExternalData: External data retrieval — report/article features fetch information from external sources such as YouTube, Spotify, RSS feeds, news, weather, and GitHub trending. These requests mainly target publicly available data.
section4Embeds: Embeds and external images — if content includes images or embeds from external URLs (e.g., X/Twitter), requests are made to those URLs.
section4Plantuml: PlantUML — when rendering PlantUML diagrams, after confirming your consent, the diagram code is sent to an external PlantUML rendering server.
section5Body: At the operator's discretion, the service may use Google Analytics to collect anonymous usage data such as page views and session duration. This data is used only to improve the service and is never used for advertising or sold to third parties. No personally identifiable information is collected.
section6Body: This service does not knowingly collect information from children under 13.
section7Body: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Changes will be reflected on this page along with the update date.
section8Body: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us via <link>GitHub Issues</link>.
